title: Tagging made faster
excerpt:

posts.author: cherylbenke (Cheryl Benkert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think it would be awesome when you “@” mention someone and start typing their name, that if you like the first result that pulls up, you can got “tab” and have it accept that result, similar to Facebook tagging.
Is this possible?
